name: Kafein Yazilim Hizmetleri Ticaret A.S.
summary: Kafein Yazilim Hizmetleri Ticaret A.S. provides various software solutions and services in Turkey and internationally. The company offers intelligent emotion analysis that enables emotion recognition and classification through real-time image or video capturing; facial recognition system that provides instant demographic analysis; personal data protection projects, which allows companies to discover and correctly configure sensitive data; smart parking system to find the closest available parking area, as well as provides automatic transaction option and allows payments without leaving the vehicle; and insurance management system to monitor insurance inventories and policies. It also provides corporate directory application to facilitate in-house communication; robotic process automation, an automatic execution of processes and operations of employees through a software; K-BI, a business intelligence platform where companies can run their performance analysis and report automatically; and K-Reward, a reward management system. In addition, the company offers turnkey projects, managed, integration projects, data management, technology and software development, and consultancy services. It serves telecommunication, insurance, finance and banking, retail, healthcare, manufacturing, and other industries. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
